title: Trump Taps Ex-AG Bondi for AI Advisory Role
description: Former U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi has been appointed by President Donald Trump to join a White House advisory committee tasked with focusing on artificial intelligence. The announcement was reported by Axios, though the White House has yet to comment on the appointment.
content:
Donald Trump, the former U.S. President, has appointed Pam Bondi, a former U.S. Attorney General, to a White House advisory committee focused on artificial intelligence, according to a recent report by Axios.

title: Rise in self-medication, AI-based diagnosismay lead to fatal results, warn doctors
description: with rise in artificial intelligence (ai)-based health apps, internet searches, and over the counter (otc) medicines, the trend of self-medication and quick fixes has increased manifold, indicating care-free stance on rise in society. doctors have pressed panic buttons, saying ai might help spread awareness but depending entirely on ai tools, on-line advice, or medical shop suggestions can become dangerous and can become lifethreatening, at time. today people commonly search symptoms on-line or use ai docto

title: SoftBank hires banks for US IPOs of SB Energy and AI robotics spinoff Roze, sources say
description: NEW YORK, ⁠May 26 (Reuters) - SoftBank Group has tapped banks to prepare initial public offerings for its energy and infrastructure developer SB ⁠Energy and its planned autonomous robotics spinout Roze, as founder Masayoshi Son ramps up the Japanese group's ‌push into artificial intelligence infrastructure amid strong investor appetite for companies underpinning AI buildout, according to two people familiar with the matter.

title: Meta plans to chop more than 600 Bay Area jobs; NetApp will cut dozens
description: Facebook app owner Meta Platforms has revealed plans to slash well over 600 jobs in the Bay Area, while NetApp will trim dozens more positions as the tech industry continues to grapple with the impact of the artificial intelligence revolution.
content:

title: Meta cuts nearly 1,400 Washington workers as AI overhaul expands
description: Meta is laying off nearly 1,400 employees across Washington state as Mark Zuckerberg pushes deeper into artificial intelligence investments and workforce restructuring.
content:
Meta’s artificial intelligence overhaul is now hitting one of the country’s largest tech corridors, with the Facebook parent company preparing to cut nearly 1,400 workers across Washington state.

title: How schools are using AI and VR to train the next generation of nurses
description: There's real concern about the growing prevalence of the use of artificial intelligence and other technologies in higher education. But some schools have found benefits as well. In the case of nursing programs, more and more are integrating immersive technologies like generative AI and virtual reality into their curricula. Ali Rogin spotlights one of those for our series, Rethinking College.
content:
Amna Nawaz:
